hub.title: Federation Hub
hub.subtitle_opted_in: Your community is connected to the federation network.
hub.subtitle_opted_out: Join the federation network to connect with partner communities.
hub.hero_title: Connect Your Community to the World
hub.hero_description: Federation lets your timebank partner with other communities — share skills, exchange services, and build a global network.
hub.how_it_works_0_description: Find other timebanks and communities to connect with across the network.
hub.how_it_works_1_description: Browse members from partner communities and connect with like-minded people.
hub.how_it_works_2_description: Offer and request services across community boundaries using time credits.
hub.feature_privacy_description: You control exactly what information is shared with partner communities.
hub.feature_instant_description: Message and transact with federated members in real time.
hub.feature_network_description: Join a growing network of timebanks and community organisations.
hub.quick_link_0_description: Browse communities in the federation network.
hub.quick_link_1_description: Find and connect with members from partner communities.
hub.quick_link_3_description: Browse offers and requests from partner communities.
hub.quick_link_4_description: Discover events happening across the federation.
hub.quick_link_5_description: Manage your federation preferences and visibility.
hub.no_partners_description: Once your community joins the federation, partner communities will appear here.
hub.no_activity_description: Activity from your partner communities will appear here.
hub.not_available_contact: Contact your community administrator to enable this feature.
hub.toast_enabled_description: Your community is now part of the federation network.
hub.toast_enable_error_description: Unable to enable federation. Please try again.
hub.toast_enable_error_generic: An unexpected error occurred while enabling federation.
hub.toast_disabled_description: Your community has left the federation network.
hub.toast_disable_error_description: Unable to disable federation. Please try again.
hub.toast_disable_error_generic: An unexpected error occurred while disabling federation.
hub.disable_confirm_message: Are you sure? Your community will be removed from the federation network.

messages.subtitle: Cross-community messages with members from partner communities.

messages.unable_to_load_description: Your messages could not be loaded. Please try again.

connections.empty_received_desc: When someone sends you a connection request, it will appear here.

settings.heading: Federation Settings
settings.subheading: Control your visibility and preferences across partner communities.
settings.load_error_retry: Failed to load settings. Please try again.
settings.federation_active_description: Your profile is visible to partner communities.
settings.federation_disabled_description: Your profile is not shared with partner communities.
settings.show_profile_description: Make your profile visible to members in partner communities.
settings.appear_search_description: Allow partner community members to find you in search.
settings.share_skills_description: Show your skills and interests to federated members.
settings.share_location_description: Show your location to members in partner communities.
settings.show_reviews_description: Display your reviews to federated members.
settings.show_reviews_federated.help: Your reviews from this community will be visible to partner members.
settings.allow_messaging_description: Let members from partner communities send you messages.
settings.allow_transactions_description: Allow time credit transfers from partner community members.
settings.email_notifications_description: Receive email notifications for federation activity.
settings.travel_radius_description: Maximum distance you are willing to travel for a service.
settings.save_success_description: Your federation settings have been updated.
settings.save_failed_description: Your settings could not be saved. Please try again.
settings.save_failed_retry: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Join the Federation Network
onboarding.subtitle: Set up your community's federation preferences in a few steps.
onboarding.welcome_description: Connect your community with other timebanks to expand your network and exchange services across boundaries.
onboarding.benefit_discover_description: Access skills and services from members across the network.
onboarding.benefit_meet_description: Connect with like-minded members from partner communities.
onboarding.benefit_exchange_description: Use your time credits with members in other communities.
onboarding.profile_visibility_description: Control what partner community members can see about you.
onboarding.toggle_profile_visible_desc: Make your profile visible to members in partner communities.
onboarding.toggle_search_visible_desc: Allow partner community members to find you in search.
onboarding.toggle_skills_shared_desc: Show your skills and interests to federated members.
onboarding.toggle_location_shared_desc: Show your location to federated members.
onboarding.toggle_reviews_visible_desc: Display your reviews to federated members.
onboarding.communication_preferences_description: Choose how partner community members can interact with you.
onboarding.toggle_messaging_desc: Let members from partner communities send you messages.
onboarding.toggle_transactions_desc: Accept time credit transfers from partner community members.
onboarding.toggle_email_notifications_desc: Receive email notifications for federation activity.
onboarding.service_reach_description: How far are you willing to travel or offer remote services?
onboarding.travel_radius_description: Maximum distance you are willing to travel.
onboarding.review_settings_description: Check your preferences before enabling federation.
